What are the three characteristics that define an innovation platform for us?
The most important one is they follow something called rights law, which measures the learning curve. How fast the costs are going to decline with this new technology.
Technology is deflationary costs fall over time and they're passed through into lower prices or better performance one or the other.
That is the most important a machine can figure that out. I'm sure. But asking the questions are going to be important.
